title: Plugin Host `Evaluate` — per-action ABAC for plugin commands
summary: Specifies a new plugin-host `Evaluate` RPC/host-capability enabling per-subcommand and principal-attribute ABAC checks for plugin commands, replacing coarse command/capability gates that never evaluate resource-instance or admin-role policies. Reuses existing plugin-owned resource types, AttributeResolver, and policy declarations from prior ABAC trust-boundary work. Unblocks admin-gating of the scene publish vote extend action (E2).
